text: Cost Composite Tier: High, Average, Low, N/A (pre-IR) Cost Composite Tier value determined based on Cost Composite Tier (High, Average, Low, N/A) before Informal Review process 34 Char 8 N/A=Practice did not meet minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements, Low=Practice's Cost Composite Score is at least one standard deviation below benchmark and statistically significantly different from benchmark, Average=Practice's Cost Composite Score is less than one standard deviation away from the
